# `fiscal/centre_transfers_to_states_tax_devolution`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: Devolution of central taxes to states (all-India)  
**One-line**: States' share in the divisible pool of central taxes — the constitutional, Finance-Commission-driven stream that the Centre is obligated to pass on to the states.  
**Source artifact last modified**: 2026-05-16 (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/fiscal/centre_transfers_to_states_tax_devolution.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/fiscal/centre_transfers_to_states_tax_devolution.json)

## Definition

States' share in the divisible pool of central taxes — the constitutional, Finance-Commission-driven stream that the Centre is obligated to pass on to the states. This is Item I of RBI Appendix Table 2 and is the single largest component of Centre-to-State transfers. Per the 15th Finance Commission, states currently receive 41% of the divisible pool (down from 42% pre-J&K-bifurcation).
